text: The surgeon performs primary closure of the abdominal wall defect following the resection of the hernia sac, preparing for the placement of a dual mesh.

During the laparoscopic re-operation, the surgeon dissects multiple adhesions to expose the hernia sac. A three-centimeter defect at the upper edge of the PTFE dual mesh is identified and closed with non-absorbable stitches, securing the mesh to the fascial margin.
The surgeon places a larger intraperitoneal dual mesh prosthesis to cover the entire abdominal wall, ensuring complete coverage of the repaired area.
